title: Will Acadia (ACAD) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals has demonstrated a strong track record of beating earnings estimates. Over the preceding 2 years, ACAD had beaten EPS estimates 63% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 75% of the time. Going into Q3 2021, the consensus EPS estimate was -$0.26 and the consensus revenue estimate was $127.77 million, representing a 6.0% year-over-year increase. In August 2021, following Q2 earnings, ACADIA had lowered its 2021 revenue guidance citing the impact of the pandemic on patient visits and lower occupancy rates at long-term care facilities. However, analysts remained optimistic about the company's medium and long-term prospects. Q3 2021 results ultimately showed a loss of 9 cents per share, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of 27 cents. The consistent beat rate reinforced investor confidence in the company's ability to manage market challenges and execute operationally.
